title.en: NTEK Test Report Updated For Building Toy Series
title.zh: 创意拼搭玩具系列 NTEK 测试报告更新完成

excerpt.en: The latest NTEK test report has been matched with current samples so teams can check piece count, material notes, photos, and packaging files from one version.
excerpt.zh: 最新 NTEK 测试报告已与当前样品资料对应，便于核对件数、材料说明、样品照片和包装文件。

body.en:
The NTEK test report for the creative building toy series has been updated and organized for sample confirmation and internal file sharing.

For overseas customers, clear test documentation helps internal teams check the same sample version. A stable report version reduces repeated confirmation across sourcing, quality, and compliance teams.

The report version matches current samples

The updated file is aligned with the current creative building toy series, making it easier for customers to review material, structure, and launch readiness using the same version.

When several roles review the project, one shared file reduces misunderstanding and makes answers more accurate.

File sharing takes less time

Sourcing teams often need to pass test reports to category, compliance, or retail-channel teams. Preparing the file in advance reduces last-minute document requests.

It also supports production communication

The report is not only useful at the sample stage. It can also support production planning, shipment preparation, and repeat-order discussion when customers ask again about scope or file status.

The Test Report Should Match The Current Product Version

After the NTEK report update, samples, files, and internal approval can stay under one version. For the fort building series, piece count, material description, sample photos, and report scope need to match.

Keep These Details Easy To Check

Check pointReviewPractical use
Sample versionProduct name, piece count, material, colorAvoids using the wrong report or old version
Target marketU.S., EU, or customer-specified marketHelps judge ASTM F963, EN71, or other file needs
Packaging filesLabels, warnings, instructions, tracking informationReduces late document requests before shipment

Keep The Report With The Matching Sample

For updated NTEK files, provide SKU, piece count, sample photo, report number, and target market. The file can then be checked against the right building-toy version before it is shared internally.

View ComplianceBrowse ProductsSend File Request
body.zh:
创意拼搭玩具系列的 NTEK 测试报告已完成更新，相关资料可用于样品确认和内部资料共享。

对海外客户来说，测试资料是否清晰，会影响内部团队能否核对同一个样品版本。稳定的报告版本能减少业务、品质和采购之间反复确认。

报告版本与当前样品对齐

更新后的文件已与当前创意拼搭玩具系列资料对齐，便于客户在评估材料、结构和上市准备时使用同一版本。

当项目涉及多个角色审核时，统一文件能减少误读，也能让问题回复更准确。

资料共享更省时间

项目团队通常需要把测试报告转交给品类、合规或零售渠道团队。资料提前整理好，可以减少临时补文件的情况。

也服务后续量产沟通

报告不仅用于样品阶段，也可以在量产计划、出货准备和复购沟通中作为参考。客户再次询问测试范围或文件状态时，团队能基于同一版本回复。

测试报告要和当前产品版本对应

NTEK 测试报告更新后，样品、文件和内部审核可以放在同一版本下确认。对堡垒拼搭系列来说，件数、材料描述、样品照片和报告范围需要保持一致。

把这些细节整理清楚

核对项建议查看实际用途
样品版本产品名称、件数、材料、颜色避免用错报告或旧版本
目标市场美国、欧盟或客户指定市场判断是否需要 ASTM F963、EN71 等资料
包装资料标签、警示语、说明书、追溯信息减少临近出货时补文件

把报告和对应样品放在一起

确认 NTEK 文件时，建议同步提供 SKU、件数、样品照片、报告编号和目标市场。资料先与正确的拼搭玩具版本对应，再转交内部团队会更稳妥。

查看资质合规浏览产品提交文件需求
